title: Singing Difficulty Radar Chart
brief: A technical radar chart (spider web chart) showing singing difficulty metrics for the song '左手指月'. Six axes: 音域跨度(Pitch Range), 气息控制(Breath Control), 真假声切换(Vocal Register Switching), 花腔技巧(Coloratura), 情感表达(Emotional Expression), 现场稳定性(Live Stability). The radar area is filled in glowing red-orange, extending to near-maximum on almost all axes. Background is dark with grid lines. A small annotation box shows '综合难度指数: 9.7/10'. Title: 'FIGURE 4: 演唱难度雷达图 (Performance Difficulty Radar)'. Clean technical infographic style with Chinese and English labels.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Singing Difficulty Radar Chart'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-2k. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A technical radar chart (spider web chart) showing singing difficulty metrics for the song '左手指月'. Six axes: 音域跨度(Pitch Range), 气息控制(Breath Control), 真假声切换(Vocal Register Switching), 花腔技巧(Coloratura), 情感表达(Emotional Expression), 现场稳定性(Live Stability). The radar area is filled in glowing red-orange, extending to near-maximum on almost all axes. Background is dark with grid lines. A small annotation box shows '综合难度指数: 9.7/10'. Title: 'FIGURE 4: 演唱难度雷达图 (Performance Difficulty Radar)'. Clean technical infographic style with Chinese and English labels.
